items.details: Selected prefix espocrm-dev at 2026-04-19_08-00-00 with manifest REPLACE_MANIFEST_JSON.

Prepared REPLACE_DRILL_ENV_FILE with compose project espo-restore-drill-dev, db storage REPLACE_DRILL_DB_STORAGE, files storage REPLACE_DRILL_ESPO_STORAGE, and backup root REPLACE_DRILL_BACKUP_ROOT. Drill URL: REPLACE_SITE_URL.
Started the temporary database and confirmed readiness. Readiness waits are sharing a 123 second timeout budget.
Restored database espocrm_restore_drill_dev in container mock-db from REPLACE_DB_BACKUP. The selected backup set is anchored by REPLACE_MANIFEST_JSON.
Replaced REPLACE_DRILL_ESPO_STORAGE from REPLACE_FILES_BACKUP and reconciled the storage permissions to the runtime image contract. The selected backup set is anchored by REPLACE_MANIFEST_JSON.
Confirmed readiness for db, espocrm, espocrm-daemon, espocrm-websocket. The final HTTP probe was skipped because of --skip-http-probe.

warnings: Restore-drill will skip the final HTTP probe because of --skip-http-probe.
Temporary restore-drill contour preserved because of --keep-artifacts.
